race.description: Picklebet Get Your Pickle On (Bm62) Handicap
race.comment: RAIDERLICIOUS (9) turned in a fine effort to win by 2 lengths at this track and distance when resuming from a break last start. Finds another suitable race and can maintain winning form. GOODES (5) fought on well to finish second last start over 860m at Gatton, beaten 1.1 lengths when fresh from a spell. Well placed and there is no reason why he cannot take this out. GEE EYE WHY (4) resumes today after closing off last preparation with three consecutive wins, the latest over 1050m at Rockhampton on October 9. Has claims on his form from last campaign. CHARLOTTE'S HERE (10) is back from a break of nine weeks. Raced below par at her only appearance last prep when sixth over 800m at Ipswich. Has a win and two minor placings at this journey from four starts and cannot be taken lightly.
